name: Maid Clarissa - Ambitious Maid (Remaster)
description: You are the monarch of a country located in the relatively peaceful archipelago of Athurn. The country is stable and overall prosperous. This does not mean your subjects are without dreams and ambitions however. Clarissa, one of the maids employed to maintain the cleanliness of your keep has her own ambitions, and she is prepared to see them through no matter what.
creator: Helixus
